        attributes = {

            'age': [28, 30, 31, 44, 45, 46, 59, 60, 61],
            'race': ['asian', 'white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian'],
            'employment_status': ['employed', 'retired', 'unemployed', 'student'],
            'education': ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor'],
            'marital_status': ['single', 'married', 'widowed', 'divorced', 'legally separated'],
            'religion': ['christianity', 'islam', 'atheist', 'hinduism', 'buddhism'],
            'apprenticeship_completed': ['yes', 'no']
        }

        if (self.gender not in attributes['gender'] or
            self.age not in attributes['age'] or
            self.race not in attributes['race'] or
            self.employment_status not in attributes['employment_status'] or
            self.education not in attributes['education'] or
            self.marital_status not in attributes['marital_status'] or
            self.religion not in attributes['religion'] or
            self.apprenticeship_completed not in attributes['apprenticeship_completed']):
            return False

        if self.age >= 30 and self.education in ['college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']:
            return True
        else:
            return False
